title: German Words - Quick Summary
items: **These words are not truly impossible to translate:** they need more than one neat English word.
**Feierabend** is the end of the workday and the start of protected personal time.
**Fernweh** is longing for faraway places, while **Schadenfreude** names joy at someone else's bad luck.
**Gemütlichkeit, Torschlusspanik and verschlimmbessern** show how German compresses whole situations into one word.
**Doch is tiny but powerful:** it can contradict a negative statement, soften a sentence or add emphasis.
